g.text: More frames don't help: overall flat then falling — temporal-ordering categories degrade most

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Inter', 'Source Sans Pro', 'Source Sans 3', 'Helvetica', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'Liberation Sans', 'Nimbus Sans', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #6e6a5e

g.text: 2×2-stitch presentation · InternVL3-8B · 1000 CVBench questions × 4 passes · line = mean, band = ±1 std, dot = best budget · panels sorted by gain 8→128

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'Inter', 'Source Sans Pro', 'Source Sans 3', 'Helvetica', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'Liberation Sans', 'Nimbus Sans', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #6e6a5e

g.text: Dashed = chance, the score of a uniform random guesser: mean over that panel's questions of 1∕(number of answer options). Not a flat 25% — Cross-video Scene Recognition is mostly yes/no.

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Inter', 'Source Sans Pro', 'Source Sans 3', 'Helvetica', 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial', 'Liberation Sans', 'Nimbus Sans', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; fill: #6e6a5e

g.text: frame budget (stitched 2×2 timesteps per question, log scale)
